posts.text: Food is being produced in different ways in China today. Organic items are rising in popularity—and though still mostly for the middle class, produce has become cheaper as more farmers have started growing it https://www.economist.com/china/2026/06/14/the-californication-of-middle-class-chinese-diets?taid=6a349df70a5bfc0001a3c58c&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: US margin debt jumped by +$112 billion in May, to a record $1.42 trillion.

This marks the 2nd consecutive monthly increase, totaling +$195 billion.

Margin debt has surged +$495 billion, or +54%, over the last 12 months.

Adjusted for inflation, this metric rose +7.9% MoM and +47.4% YoY.

Real margin debt has now grown +550% since 1997, far outpacing the S&P 500’s real gain of +357.7% over the same period.

Market leverage continues to rise at a historic rate.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
